title: Smart Money Copier
description: Track known alpha wallets and surface their new token buys the moment they execute — build a copy trading radar using wallet activity streaming.
useCase: Build a copy trading intelligence tool that monitors a curated list of smart money wallets and surfaces new token buys in real-time.

keyParams.walletAddresses: Curated list of smart money wallet addresses to monitor
keyParams.chainName: EVM chain to monitor for copy trades
keyParams.minPositionUsd: Minimum USD value of a new buy to surface as a signal
